description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe, predominantly white with vibrant blue and orange accents. The upper is constructed from a breathable mesh material, featuring three blue stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with white laces threaded through orange eyelets. The midsole is black with a speckled white pattern, providing a visually striking contrast and likely enhanced cushioning. The heel area is reinforced and displays the 'ultra boost' label, indicating advanced comfort technology. The outsole appears textured for grip, and the overall condition is pristine, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A white athletic running shoe with blue stripes, orange accents, and a speckled black midsole, featuring a breathable mesh upper and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white mesh toe, orange eyelets, and Adidas tongue logo with laces tied.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the three blue stripes, orange accents, and the speckled black midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the reinforced heel, visible collar opening, and part of the 'ultra boost' label.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the three blue stripes, orange accents, and the full 'ultra boost' label on the heel.
attribute_logo: Adidas logo on the tongue, triangular shape with yellow, red, and white colors
